summary: Iteration 2 testing completed successfully after ReactQuill fix. All critical functionality working including admin login, dashboard, custom rich text editor, and frontend features.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate)
Admin dashboard loading without ReactQuill error (fix confirmed)
New Article modal opening with custom RichTextEditor
Custom RichTextEditor toolbar functionality (Bold, Italic, H2, List, Link buttons)
Category filtering working (Todas, Capacitación, Operadora de aventura, etc.)
WhatsApp floating button visible and accessible
Company cards display with proper categorization and featured status
Sidebar logo visibility in admin dashboard
